gist.headline: Watering the apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (representing the automated bot) watering pixelated code-plants (representing the apps) in a greenhouse. Polly the bee is hovering nearby with a tiny clipboard checking off a list.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering small pixelated code-plants in a lime green (#ecf874) greenhouse. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering small pixelated code-plants in a lime green (#ecf874) greenhouse. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
